title: I walked home with three coding agents still running
description:
Three agents running. So I walked to my car with my open laptop instead. This is what agentic coding feels like now: you start agents on a task, then keep moving. No waiting. No shutdown. The work runs while you drive home.

plepic.com/training?utm_source=youtube&utm_content=2026-05-11-three-agents-walking

#AgenticCoding #ClaudeCode #SoftwareAgency #Automation #DeveloperTools #Workflow
pinnedComment: If your agents are running locally, do you just carry your laptop around, or have you found a way to detach?
